label: VS Code (Copilot)

config_paths.macos: VS Code user MCP settings (preferred) or .vscode/mcp.json
config_paths.linux: VS Code user MCP settings (preferred) or .vscode/mcp.json
config_paths.windows: VS Code user MCP settings (preferred) or .vscode\mcp.json
config_paths.wsl: VS Code user MCP settings (preferred) or .vscode/mcp.json

notes: Prefer user-level MCP settings for credentials; workspace mcp.json should not embed secrets. Prefer user-level or private client config; never commit Application Passwords to project-tracked files.
config_path: VS Code user MCP settings (preferred) or .vscode/mcp.json
